title: Validate promo-code totals and feedback
summary: Illustrative fixture only — no live model or browser run. This example checks whether promo-code feedback changes the checkout total.

affectedAreas.name: Checkout total calculation
evidence: src/checkout.js changes how valid and expired promo codes update the displayed total.

affectedAreas.name: Expired promo feedback
evidence: index.html adds an alert element and src/checkout.js controls its visibility.

manualChecklist: Apply SAVE10 and confirm the total changes from $100.00 to $90.00.
Apply EXPIRED10 and confirm the error is visible while the total remains $100.00.
Apply an unknown code and confirm no stale success or error state remains.
Confirm no payment or order submission occurs during promo validation.
edgeCases: Apply a valid code after an expired code.
Submit whitespace and mixed-case promo values.

automationCandidates.title: Valid promo updates the total
reason: The pricing branch changed and directly affects the amount shown to the buyer.

steps.instruction: Enter the valid synthetic promo code.
Confirm the discounted total is visible.

automationCandidates.title: Expired promo preserves the total
reason: The new expired-code branch must not apply a discount.

steps.instruction: Enter the expired synthetic promo code.
Confirm the expired error is visible and the total is unchanged.
